/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wno-tautological-constant-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/unittest_ypipe.dir/unittest_ypipe.cpp.o -o ../bin/unittest_ypipe   -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/8.5.0  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib64  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib  ../lib/libtestutil-static.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a ../lib/libzmq.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so -lbsd -lrt ../lib/libunity.a
